name: Poseidon Nickel Limited
description: Poseidon Nickel Limited is an Australian-based nickel sulphide exploration and development company listed on the ASX. The company focuses on the exploration, development, and potential production of nickel and gold, holding a significant resource base. Its primary assets include the Black Swan, Lake Johnston, and Windarra Nickel Projects, all strategically located within a 300-kilometer radius of Kalgoorlie in the Goldfields region of Western Australia. Poseidon Nickel aims to leverage these assets to become a sustainable producer, contributing to the global demand for nickel in the evolving energy and battery metals sector.
